title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 28/03/2023
Image reference: 2023-03-28_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-28-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Capesize values have firmed
Capesize Mulan (176,300 DWT, Nov 2005, Universal) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 16.00 mil, VV Value USD 16.63 mil - BWTS. Panamax TR Infinity (77,100 DWT, Aug 2015, Imabari) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 25.50 mil, VV Value USD 25.86 mil - DD Due. Panamax Magic Moon (76,600 DWT, Aug 2005, Imabari) sold to unknown South Korean buyers for USD 13.90 mil, VV Value USD 13.46 mil.
